tasks.subject: Task 0: Pin per-field bug repros in WeaponModsExpanderTests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lock Clay Pigeons / Tester-10 / Light's Out into red tests before any production code changes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `AddMissingQuestRequirements.Tests/Pipeline/Attachment/WeaponModsExpanderTests.cs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 3 new failing tests added under `// ── Bug repros (per-field semantics) ──`
- Build green; existing tests untouched

**Verify:** `dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~WeaponModsExpanderTests" -c Release`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["AddMissingQuestRequirements.Tests/Pipeline/Attachment/WeaponModsExpanderTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~WeaponModsExpanderTests\" -c Release", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3 new failing tests added", "build green", "existing tests untouched"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Model + ModConfig + MergeHelper plumbing for bundles + cap
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Schema changes only (no behavior). Add `IncludedModBundles`/`ExcludedModBundles` on QuestOverrideEntry, `ModBundleCartesianCap` on ModConfig, MergeHelper structural-dedupe union.

**Files:**
- Modify: `AddMissingQuestRequirements/Models/QuestOverrideEntry.cs`
- Modify: `AddMissingQuestRequirements/Models/ModConfig.cs`
- Modify: `AddMissingQuestRequirements/Util/MergeHelper.cs`
- Modify: `AddMissingQuestRequirements.Tests/Util/MergeHelperTests.cs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- New bundle fields, IncludedMods/ExcludedMods XML docs rewritten
- ModBundleCartesianCap int default 500
- MergeHelper unions bundles by sorted-distinct key
- New merge test passes; only the 3 Task 0 repros fail

**Verify:** `dotnet build -c Release && dotnet test --filter "Category!=Integration" -c Release`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["AddMissingQuestRequirements/Models/QuestOverrideEntry.cs", "AddMissingQuestRequirements/Models/ModConfig.cs", "AddMissingQuestRequirements/Util/MergeHelper.cs", "AddMissingQuestRequirements.Tests/Util/MergeHelperTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release && dotnet test --filter \"Category!=Integration\" -c Release", "acceptanceCriteria": ["new model fields", "MergeHelper unions bundles", "merge test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: WeaponModsExpander rework — per-field + cartesian + cap
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace symmetric RewriteField with per-field calls. IncludedMods/IncludedModBundles → inclusive only; ExcludedMods/ExcludedModBundles → exclusive only. Drop semantics removed. Cap enforced per entry.

**Files:**
- Modify: `AddMissingQuestRequirements/Pipeline/Attachment/WeaponModsExpander.cs`
- Modify: `AddMissingQuestRequirements.Tests/Pipeline/Attachment/WeaponModsExpanderTests.cs`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 3 Task 0 repros now pass
- Drop-semantic tests removed, replaced by per-field append tests
- Cartesian + cap tests added and pass

**Verify:** `dotnet test --filter "Category!=Integration" -c Release`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["AddMissingQuestRequirements/Pipeline/Attachment/WeaponModsExpander.cs", "AddMissingQuestRequirements.Tests/Pipeline/Attachment/WeaponModsExpanderTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test --filter \"Category!=Integration\" -c Release", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bug repros pass", "cartesian tests pass", "cap tests pass", "drop tests removed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: QuestOverrides schema v2 → v3 migration with semantic-flip notice
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bump quest schema version. Migration plants a sentinel when any entry has non-empty `excludedMods`; the override reader surfaces it as a one-line load warning.

**Files:**
- Modify: `AddMissingQuestRequirements/Config/Migrations.cs`
- Modify: `AddMissingQuestRequirements/Pipeline/Override/OverrideReader.cs`
- Modify/Create: migration tests file

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `v2_to_v3_Quest` migration added
- CurrentVersion bumped 2 → 3, migration list updated
- Warning surfaces in logger when sentinel present
- Sentinel stripped before deserialization
- Migration tests added

**Verify:** `dotnet test --filter "Category!=Integration" -c Release`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["AddMissingQuestRequirements/Config/Migrations.cs", "AddMissingQuestRequirements/Pipeline/Override/OverrideReader.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test --filter \"Category!=Integration\" -c Release", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CurrentVersion=3", "sentinel migration works", "warning surfaces", "sentinel stripped"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Inspector report surfaces ModBundles fields
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Inspector JSON + HTML report show `overrideIncludedModBundles` / `overrideExcludedModBundles`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `AddMissingQuestRequirements/Reporting/InspectorResult.cs`
- Modify: `AddMissingQuestRequirements/Reporting/ReportBuilder.cs`
- Modify: `AddMissingQuestRequirements/Reporting/Assets/report.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Inspector model has new fields; populated by ReportBuilder
- report.js renders bundles when non-empty (members joined by ' + ')
- Manual smoke test

**Verify:** `dotnet build -c Release` + manual inspector run

```json:metadata
{"files": ["AddMissingQuestRequirements/Reporting/InspectorResult.cs", "AddMissingQuestRequirements/Reporting/ReportBuilder.cs", "AddMissingQuestRequirements/Reporting/Assets/report.js"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fields added", "populated", "rendered", "smoke tested"]}
```

- Modify: `CLAUDE.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
